---
name: Bug report
about: Report a compiler error, crash, or incorrect output
title: ''
labels: bug
---

**What happened?**
A clear description of the bug.

**Code to reproduce**
```newt
// paste your .newt code here
```

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen.

**Actual behavior**
What actually happened. Include the error message if there is one.

**Environment**
- OS: [e.g., macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- Compiler version: [output of `newter-compiler --help`]
- Install method: [cargo / binary download]
